---
title: Add notifications and broadcast system
labels: [backend, frontend]
estimate: 2-3 days
---

Summary
- Implement notifications with user settings and admin broadcast capability.

Tasks
- Add `Notification` and `NotificationSetting` models/endpoints.
- Add `POST /broadcasts` to create admin broadcasts.
- Implement frontend notification center and per-user preference toggles.

Acceptance Criteria
- Users receive persisted notifications and can adjust settings.
